subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Thy letter was received. Though I have not the leisure, yet I pen this brief reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی نامه شما رسید هر چند من فرصت ندارم ولی جواب مختصر مینگارم
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Letters of the Living
